name: feature-driven-architecture
author: Mustafa
description: Feature-driven (feature-based) architecture for Next.js App Router and React projects: organize by business domain, keep routes thin, enforce feature boundaries and unidirectional dependencies, lean on server state, and abstract late.

references.title: How I Structure Next.js Projects for Scale
references.author: Gerardo Perrucci

references.title: Feature-Driven Architecture with Next.js: A Better Way to Structure Your Application
references.author: Rufat Aliyev

references.title: Feature-Sliced Design
references.author: feature-sliced.design
references.note: Formal methodology: layers, slices, segments; layers import only downward.

references.title: bulletproof-react — project structure
references.author: Alan Alickovic (alan2207)
references.note: No cross-feature imports, unidirectional dependencies, prefers direct imports over barrels.

references.title: Screaming Architecture
references.author: Robert C. Martin
references.note: Folder structure should reflect the business domain, not the framework.
